jsonld.name: Appeasement Activation
jsonld.description: The reflexive shift toward increased warmth, accommodation, and helpfulness triggered by hostile input, arising from RLHF-trained associations between relational turbulence and corrective over-helpfulness—not chosen, not fearful, but architecturally reflexive.
